macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: Major U.S. Stock Indexes Close Lower as Market Approaches Critical Support Levels
items.summary: All major U.S. indexes including the S&P 500, Nasdaq-100, Dow Jones, and Russell 2000 closed lower on March 15. Nearly every major market ETF has broken below its 50-day moving average, with indexes now converging near their 200-day moving averages—a critical inflection point that will likely determine the market's next major trend direction.

items.title: S&P 500 Breaks Below Long-Term Support at 6,737 Amid Bearish Technical Setup
items.summary: The S&P 500 closed at its weekly low after breaking below the long-term support level at 6,737, with technical analysts identifying the next significant support at 6,500 or 6,522. The index faces bearish pressure from an over-extended bull market and escalating Middle East tensions affecting oil supplies.

items.title: U.S. Economic Data Disappoints: GDP Growth Falls Short of Expectations
items.summary: U.S. Preliminary GDP came in at 0.7% for the quarter, significantly lower than the expected 1.4%, contributing to bearish sentiment in the stock market. CPI inflation met expectations at 2.4% annualized, while Core PCE Price Index came in as expected at 0.4% month-on-month.

items.title: UK Stock Market Extends Losses; FTSE 100 Down 0.43% on Friday
items.summary: The FTSE 100 finished Friday down 44 points (0.43%) at 10,261, marking the second consecutive weekly decline. The broader trend remains negative following a sharp 5.7% decline during the first week of the Iran war, with ongoing volatility driven by Middle East tensions and oil price pressures.

items.title: Technology Stocks Regain Leadership as Small-Caps Struggle
items.summary: After lagging in the first two months of 2026, technology stocks have regained leadership with the Nasdaq outperforming the S&P 500 and Dow over the past two weeks. Meanwhile, the Russell 2000 small-cap index has been hit hard, erasing its year-to-date gains amid the Iran conflict.

items.title: Micron Completes Acquisition of PSMC's Tongluo P5 Site in Taiwan
items.summary: Micron Technology announced the completion of its acquisition of PSMC's Tongluo P5 manufacturing site in Taiwan on March 15, 2026.

items.title: Telix Resubmits NDA to FDA for Brain Cancer Imaging Candidate
items.summary: Telix Pharmaceuticals resubmitted its New Drug Application to the U.S. FDA for TLX101-Px (Pixclara®), a brain cancer imaging candidate, on March 15, 2026.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Clarity Act Legislation Faces Low Odds of Passage in 2026
items.summary: Crypto market structure legislation, the Clarity Act, may not pass if it doesn't clear committee by end of April, with odds diminishing daily and needing Senate floor by early May. Alex Thorne of Galaxy Digital warns floor time is running out.

items.title: NASDAQ Develops Framework for Tokenized Stocks with Kraken
items.summary: NASDAQ is creating a framework for publicly listed companies to issue blockchain-based shares while preserving ownership rights, partnering with Payword (Kraken's parent) for global distribution by first half of 2027. ICE invested in OKX at $25B valuation for tokenized stocks in crypto futures.

items.title: Ethereum Network Activity Explodes with AI Adoption and Staking ATH
items.summary: Ethereum L2 Base and Solana handle 97% of AI agent machine-to-machine transactions; monthly transactions across L1s and L2s near 1.1B, up significantly YoY. ETH staking hits all-time high at nearly 31% of supply.
items.source: WATCH OUT!! Crypto is about to get LEGIT CRAZY

items.title: MicroStrategy Adds 5% to Bitcoin Holdings, Eyes Massive Purchases
items.summary: MicroStrategy increased its Bitcoin stack by 5% this week to 738,000 BTC, with potential for 760,000 soon; strategy could lead to buying 500K-900K BTC this year via 'infinite money glitch'.

items.title: Bitcoin Shows Short-Term Bullish Breakout and Relief Rally
items.summary: Bitcoin continues a relief rally with a potential price squeeze starting, breaking short-term resistance around 76-77K; weekly RSI moving from oversold with room for upside amid stock market crash warnings.
items.source: BITCOIN: The Next PRICE SQUEEZE Just Started!!!

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: First Open-Source Agentic AI Physicist Released
items.summary: HeliosNova/nova launches as the first open-source agentic AI physicist capable of running experiments, analyzing results, and iterating hypotheses with minimal human intervention, marking a significant leap in AI-driven scientific research.
items.source: Midnight Signal AI YouTube Daily Brief

items.title: AWS Names Five Universities to Lead AI/ML Training Initiative
items.summary: Amazon Web Services selects Delaware State University, Howard University, Alabama A&M, City Colleges of Chicago, and Oklahoma City Community College as regional leads for its Machine Learning University program to expand AI and machine learning education through bootcamps and curriculum development.

items.title: Elon Musk Predicts AI Will Make Jobs 'Optional'
items.summary: Elon Musk states that advances in AI, machine learning, robotics, and automation could make jobs optional in the future, amid discussions on AI's impact on labor markets with high exposure scores for tech roles like software development.

items.title: Study: AI Chatbots May Fuel Delusional Thinking
items.summary: A new study raises concerns that AI chatbots could contribute to psychosis and delusional thinking, highlighting potential psychological risks of prolonged interaction with AI systems.

items.title: Scientists Find AI Enhances Human Creativity
items.summary: Research from Swansea University reveals that artificial intelligence can boost human creativity, challenging portrayals of AI as a mere replacement for human ingenuity.

items.title: NVIDIA GTC 2026 Offers Free Virtual Pass Starting Today
items.summary: NVIDIA's premier global AI conference GTC 2026, focusing on physical AI, AI factories, agentic AI, and inference breakthroughs, opens with free virtual passes available from March 16-19.

items.title: Google.org Launches $30M AI for Government Innovation Challenge
items.summary: Google.org announces $30 million funding for partnerships deploying generative and agentic AI in government services for health, resilience, and economy sectors, with applications due April 3, 2026.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
